hero.title: Your AI for Life's Journey, with friends!
hero.subtitle: Create custom AI solutions and collaborate with your favorite AI models in a multiplayer environment.

multiplayer.title: Multiplayer
multiplayer.description: Invite more of your human buddies into a chat with your favorite AIs.

aiFamily.title: AI Family
aiFamily.description: Choose from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Llama, and many more!

voiceInOut.title: Voice In/Out
voiceInOut.description: Fancy AI Voices from Google to have your answers read to you in a natural-sounding voice. Use your mic to chat text in.

imagesGraphs.title: Images, Diagrams, Graphs, Charts
imagesGraphs.description: Divinci knows when you're asking to generate an image, chart or diagram.

qualityAssurance.title: Quality Assurance
qualityAssurance.description: Our friendly quality checks make sure AI answers are helpful and accurate for you.

textMessaging.title: Text Messaging
textMessaging.description: Text Divinci™ while you're out on the go, hands-free with "Hey Siri/Google, text Divinci".

releaseManagement.title: Release Management
releaseManagement.description: Regular updates that bring you new features and improvements to enhance your AI experience.

sharePrivate.title: Sharable/Private Chats
sharePrivate.description: Share Chats with friends to join in. Make a chat publicly readable or make a chat completely private.

rag.title: Retrieval Augmentation
rag.description: Upload files to your chat to make a custom AI that learns those files and prioritizes them in answering.

expertAi.title: Expert AIs
expertAi.description: Get help from AIs that specialize in topics like health, finance, and more.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from people who are using Divinci AI in their daily lives

items.quote: Divinci AI has completely transformed how I collaborate with my team. The multiplayer feature is a game-changer!
items.author: Sarah J.

items.quote: Being able to chat with multiple AI models at once has helped me compare different approaches and get the best answers.
items.author: Michael T.

items.quote: The voice features make it so easy to use Divinci while I'm cooking or doing other tasks around the house.
items.author: Elena R.

cta.title: Ready to Experience the Future of AI?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who are already enhancing their productivity with Divinci AI.
cta.note: No credit card required. Free plan available.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest features and updates.
newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
